verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: Exalt the name of your Lord, the Most High,
verse.verse_4: And who brings out the pasture
verse.verse_6: We will make you recite, [O Muhammad], and you will not forget,
verse.verse_7: Except what Allah should will. Indeed, He knows what is declared and what is hidden.
verse.verse_8: And We will ease you toward ease.
verse.verse_9: So remind, if the reminder should benefit;
verse.verse_10: He who fears [Allah] will be reminded.
verse.verse_11: But the wretched one will avoid it -
verse.verse_12: [He] who will [enter and] burn in the greatest Fire,
verse.verse_14: He has certainly succeeded who purifies himself
verse.verse_15: And mentions the name of his Lord and prays.
verse.verse_16: But you prefer the worldly life,
verse.verse_17: While the Hereafter is better and more enduring.
verse.verse_18: Indeed, this is in the former scriptures,
verse.verse_19: The scriptures of Abraham and Moses.
